title: chaerefolium cerefolium
intro: Chaerefolium cerefolium, also known as Chrysanthemum balsamita or Balsam marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe. This herb has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Chaerefolium cerefolium include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
